# @vllnt/convex-memberships

> Auth-agnostic membership and relationship graph (ReBAC tuples), as a Convex component

`@vllnt/convex-memberships` is a publishable Convex component. It targets `convex@^1.36.1`.
It stores one sandboxed table - `memberships`, holding flat ReBAC edges `(memberRef, resourceRef, relation)` with an opaque, host-classified `memberKind` (default `"user"`) and an optional opaque `status`. It lists a resource's members and a member's resources (both paginated), checks a membership (bounded `by_member_resource` lookup), changes a relation, and exposes full docs (`createdAt`, `status`) via `documents`. Edges are FLAT - no transitive expansion (`expandMembers` / `resolve` is vNext). The host owns identity, auth, and the rich entity; the component owns only the edges. `memberRef`, `resourceRef`, `relation`, `memberKind`, and `status` are opaque host strings the component never inspects.

- [README](README.md): Project overview, installation, usage examples, architecture
- [API Reference](docs/API.md): Public class methods, return shapes, input validation

## Examples

- [Example component wrapper](example/convex/example.ts): Host-app wrapper functions
- [Example tests](example/convex/example.test.ts): End-to-end usage coverage with `convex-test`
